commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR converts case-insensitive `
` tag variants to newlines in Markdown table cells and adds parser plus Google Docs insertion-request tests. Reproducibility: yes. Current main’s `parseTableRow` leaves `
` literal, the insertion path accepts newline cell content, and the linked issue provides a concrete `gog docs write --markdown` reproduction on v0.23.0 and main.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The blocking compatibility defect has a narrow mechanical parser-and-test repair suitable for the existing automerge repair loop.

target.title: fix(docs): render HTML breaks in Markdown table cells
target.body:
## Summary - convert case-insensitive `
`, `
`, and `
` forms inside Markdown table cells to newline characters - preserve existing bold, italic, code, and link handling in table cells - leave non-table Markdown parsing unchanged - add parser and Google Docs insertion-request regression tests Thanks @sebsnyk for the report and concrete reproduction in https://github.com/openclaw/gogcli/issues/730. ## Validation - `go test ./internal/cmd -run 'TestParseMarkdown.*Table|TestDocsWrite.*Markdown|Test.*Table.*Inline'` - `make fmt` - `make test` - Redacted live Google Docs proof: confirm `Alice
Bob
Carol` renders as three lines in one cell when authenticated validation is available; otherwise note the environment limitation and attach the insertion-request proof. Markdown hard breaks using two trailing spaces are intentionally not added unless they can be represented unambiguously by the existing single-line pipe-table grammar. Closes https://github.com/openclaw/gogcli/issues/730 ClawSweeper 🐠 replacement reef notes: - Cluster: issue-openclaw-gogcli-730 - Source PRs: none - Credit: Credit @sebsnyk for reporting the table-cell line-break defect and providing the concrete CLI reproduction in https://github.com/openclaw/gogcli/issues/730.; Preserve user-visible release-note context in the PR body; do not edit CHANGELOG.md in this automated repair lane.; Include redacted live Google Docs proof in the PR validation notes when executor credentials permit it; otherwise clearly record that automated parser and request-generation tests provide the reproducible proof. - Validation: go test ./internal/cmd -run 'TestParseMarkdown.*Table|TestDocsWrite.*Markdown|Test.*Table.*Inline'; make fmt; make test - Replacement reason: ClawSweeper could not update the source PR branch directly, so it opened a writable replacement PR instead. fish notes: internal review, reasoning high; reviewed against ab039659d4db.
target.author: app/clawsweeper
